name: upload_photo
description: Upload a photo to a Facebook Page or user album from a URL or binary data, with an optional caption. The photo is published immediately unless specified otherwise.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Facebook Page or user to upload the photo to.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the photo to upload. Either url or source (binary) is required.

parameters.name: published
parameters.description: Whether to publish the photo immediately. Defaults to true.
